import { Component, signal } from '@angular/core'; import { RouterLink, RouterLinkActive } from '@angular/router'; import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { ThemeService } from '../../../core/services/theme.service'; import { AuthService } from '../../../core/services/auth.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-header', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, RouterLink, RouterLinkActive], templateUrl: './header.component.html', }) export class HeaderComponent { readonly mobileOpen = signal(false); constructor( public theme: ThemeService, public auth: AuthService ) {} toggleMobile(): void { this.mobileOpen.update((v) => !v); } closeMobile(): void { this.mobileOpen.set(false); } }
